BeforeDetail: The black palace of Hades looms in the shadows.

BeforeDetail: Hades seeks a scent worthy of his letter.

BeforeDetail: Hades searches for a plant unknown even to Demeter.

BeforeDetail: Reconciliation has come, but balance must still be restored.

BeforeDetail: Zeus awaits your return and final report.

ProgressDetail: head toward to Rio

BeforeDetail: Rio feels his light slowly fading, replaced by a creeping shadow.
ProgressDetail: He admits he doesn’t feel fear - only confusion.
CompleteDetail: “If light is good,” Rio murmured, “then why does this darkness… feel so warm?”The uncertainty in his eyes grows deeper.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Angela, who has been watching from nearby.
ProgressDetail: Angela insists that light is absolute good, yet when faced with Rio’s question - “Then why does darkness exist?” - she has no answer.
CompleteDetail: The air of Heaven itself begins to twist, trembling as divine balance starts to crumble.

BeforeDetail: Angela vanishes in anger, and in her absence, Bella appears.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Bella.
CompleteDetail: Bella’s calm words seep into Rio’s mind like velvet smoke — and confusion takes deeper root within him.

BeforeDetail: Rio’s thoughts grow darker; curiosity replaces fear.
ProgressDetail: Seek out Dan in the library to ask about the nature of darkness.
CompleteDetail: Dan smiles faintly and says,“If you truly wish to understand darkness... there is one who knows it better than anyone.

BeforeDetail: Dan says the ruler of the underworld, Hades, commands the power of true darkness.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Hades.
CompleteDetail: “Darkness exists because light exists,” Hades said.“Yin and yang, life and death - both sides complete the circle.Light and shadow are never enemies... only reflections.”

BeforeDetail: Speak with Hades again.
ProgressDetail: Hades explains that the Under Flower is a paradoxical bloom — born from the depths of darkness, yet pulsing with life.
CompleteDetail: “Take this to Rio,” he said. “Perhaps only such a contradiction can calm his heart.”You deliver the Under Flower to Rio.

BeforeDetail: You find Rio, but it may already be too late — his wings have turned black.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Rio.
CompleteDetail: As you do, Alex appears - half his wings white, half black - standing between light and shadow.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Alex, who says he can restore balance.
ProgressDetail: The black flower is ready,” Alex says. “But for harmony, we need its opposite — a white flower.”Bring one Luna Flower to him.
CompleteDetail: You deliver the Luna Flower to Alex.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Alex.
ProgressDetail: Alex merges the two flowers, dark and light entwined.
CompleteDetail: He raises the glowing bloom in his hand -“The Essence of Balance is complete.”

BeforeDetail: Deliver the Essence of Balance to Rio.
ProgressDetail: You hand over the glowing essence.
CompleteDetail: A radiant wind sweeps across the heavens.Rio opens his eyes - light and shadow now coexisting within them.“Rio has Awakened: Angel of Equilibrium.”Alex smiles faintly:“At last, a new balance is born.”

BeforeDetail: Angela: “Light alone was never complete.Without darkness, we could never exist.”
ProgressDetail: Speak with Bella.
CompleteDetail: Angela finds Bella and bows her head.“I once called you a fallen one... but now I see.You bore the darkness for us all.”

BeforeDetail: Kelly guards a crimson vial filled with a story of devotion.
ProgressDetail: Accept the Blood Scent from Kelly, born from two lives bound by a bittersweet oath.
CompleteDetail: You obtained the Blood Scent - sweet, tragic, and unforgettable.

BeforeDetail: Rio stands where light and shadow meet.
ProgressDetail: Let Rio combine the gathered fragments into the Equilibrium Scent.
CompleteDetail: You obtained the Equilibrium Scent - a perfect harmony of light and darkness.

BeforeDetail: Talk Fergus.
ProgressDetail: Inject the collected scents into the navigation core and realign the starlight coordinates.
CompleteDetail: The coordinates have reacted, but one remains missing.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Lilis.
ProgressDetail: Search the engine room for the Chrono Core, the heart of the ship, to recover the Scent of Voyage.
CompleteDetail: You’ve obtained the Scent of Voyage.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Lilis.
ProgressDetail: Combine all story scents with the Scent of Voyage to reconstruct the Time Route.
CompleteDetail: The gears begin to turn, and the Chronos slowly awakens once more.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Cassandra.
ProgressDetail: The route is complete, yet the destination remains unknown.
CompleteDetail: Cassandra realizes they were never outside the story

BeforeDetail: Talk to Lilis.
ProgressDetail: Read the final page of the captain’s logbook.
CompleteDetail: Lilis writes, “We were both travelers of time and characters within it.”

BeforeDetail: Read the strange note in Joey’s room.
ProgressDetail: Iris reacts-ask her about Joey’s writing.
CompleteDetail: Joey’s clues point to Fogwood Forest.

BeforeDetail: Iris says the Sage lives beyond the northern fog; beware of wolves.
ProgressDetail: Iris says the Sage lives beyond the northern fog; beware of wolves.
CompleteDetail: You arrive safely at the Sage’s dwelling.

BeforeDetail: Approach the Sage and ask about Joey.
ProgressDetail: Listen to Jun’s explanation about Joey’s path.
CompleteDetail: Summoning a goblin requires three offerings.

BeforeDetail: Gather meat, wine, and strawberry jam for the summoning.
ProgressDetail: Deliver the offerings to Jun.
CompleteDetail: A wooden door appears-Joey passed through it.

BeforeDetail: Step through the wooden door to search for Joey.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Nora guarding the path.
CompleteDetail: She says you need the Astral Map and Astral Compass.

BeforeDetail: Return to Iris and ask about the star map.
ProgressDetail: Receive Joey’s Astral Star Map.
CompleteDetail: Find someone who can craft the Astral Compass.

BeforeDetail: Bring Joey’s blueprint to someone who can build it.
ProgressDetail: Cassandra examines the design.
CompleteDetail: The Astral Compass is complete.

BeforeDetail: Return to Nora with both celestial items.
ProgressDetail: Enter the door she opens.
CompleteDetail: Joey’s body is found ahead.

BeforeDetail: Approach Joey’s unmoving body.
ProgressDetail: Examine his condition.
CompleteDetail: Strange fragments drift around him.

BeforeDetail: Collect the drifting soul fragments.
ProgressDetail: Gather his soul’s fragrance.
CompleteDetail: You obtain Joey’s faint but warm Star Scent.

BeforeDetail: Bring Joey’s scent to Captain Casandra.
ProgressDetail: Bring Joey’s scent to Captain Casandra.
CompleteDetail: A portal opens to the soul’s location.

BeforeDetail: Enter the portal to find Joey’s soul.
ProgressDetail: Speak to Joey’s spirit.
CompleteDetail: Receive the Star Fragment.

BeforeDetail: Return the Star Fragment to Joey’s body.
ProgressDetail: Wait for the fusion to complete.
CompleteDetail: Joey awakens.

BeforeDetail: Strange sparks appear—Joey’s star records begin disappearing.
ProgressDetail: Strange sparks appear—Joey’s star records begin disappearing.
CompleteDetail: The truth is being erased.

BeforeDetail: Check on Iris and Joey’s memories.
ProgressDetail: They no longer remember the events.
CompleteDetail: You see the book closing itself to finalize the chapter.

BeforeDetail: The final page writes its own trembling sentence.
ProgressDetail: Touching the page causes the story to “approve” the ending.
CompleteDetail: The book shuts - everything fades, and the chapter ends.

BeforeDetail: Nora seems troubled. Speak with her about the strange lights appearing in the Void.
ProgressDetail: Investigate the Void and look for the source of the wandering starlight.
CompleteDetail: You discovered a mysterious rift deep inside the Void.

BeforeDetail: Enter the Void and examine the unusual rift shimmering in the distance.
ProgressDetail: Approach the rift. A familiar voice seems to echo from within...
CompleteDetail: You were pulled through the rift and ended up in the Underworld.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Hades and learn why the Underworld has been disturbed.
ProgressDetail: Listen to Hades’ explanation about the increase in lost souls.
CompleteDetail: Hades admits the rift cannot be closed by force.

BeforeDetail: Discuss a solution with Hades and Nora inside the Void.
ProgressDetail: Observe the newly created tower and learn its purpose.
CompleteDetail: The Tower of Lost Stars has been completed, and wandering souls will now gather inside it.
FindKeywardTarget: Discuss a solution inside the Void.

BeforeDetail: Enter the Tower of Lost Stars to begin cleansing lost souls.
ProgressDetail: Climb the tower—each floor contains wandering spirits of increasing strength.
CompleteDetail: You have unlocked an endless challenge that will forever test your resolve.

BeforeDetail: Sean says he has something important to give you.
ProgressDetail: Receive the Constellation Banquet book from Sean.
CompleteDetail: You obtained the mysterious banquet book.

BeforeDetail: Open the book Sean gave you.
ProgressDetail: Open the book Sean gave you.
CompleteDetail: Joey welcomes you to the shining gathering.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey inside the party.
ProgressDetail: Collect the Zodiac Star Fragments scattered across your past stories.
CompleteDetail: You begin the journey to recover all twelve fragments.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Fergus.
ProgressDetail: Search the Snow Camp Plaza.
CompleteDetail: The warmth of the first flame returns.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Camila.
ProgressDetail: Receive the Earth Fragment she crafted through long patience.
CompleteDetail: You obtained the Earth Fragment.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Erik near the shoreline.
ProgressDetail: Track the survivor traces and find the Shell Fragment.
CompleteDetail: You obtained the Shell Fragment.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Blake.
ProgressDetail: Receive the Crown Fragment symbolizing shared light.
CompleteDetail: You obtained the Crown Fragment.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Emily at the cathedral.
ProgressDetail: Recover the Blood Oath Fragment.
CompleteDetail: You obtained the Blood Oath Fragment.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Angela.
ProgressDetail: Retrieve the Balance Fragment.
CompleteDetail: You obtained the Balance Fragment.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Casandra in the navigation archive.
ProgressDetail: Search the ship for the Abyss Fragment.
CompleteDetail: You obtained the Abyss Fragment.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Joey.
ProgressDetail: Recover the Arrow Fragment from his record of journeys.
CompleteDetail: You obtained the Arrow Fragment.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Alex.
ProgressDetail: Receive the Resolve Fragment forged through inner discipline.
CompleteDetail: You obtained the Resolve Fragment.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Jun
ProgressDetail: Gather the Water Fragment shaped by innovation.
CompleteDetail: You obtained the Water Fragment.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Vincent by the Underworld river.
ProgressDetail: Retrieve the Cycle Fragment representing rebirth.
CompleteDetail: You obtained the Cycle Fragment.

BeforeDetail: Speack With Dan
ProgressDetail: Speack With Dan
CompleteDetail: The truth of the Librarians is revealed.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Sean in the library.
ProgressDetail: Talk with Dan
CompleteDetail: You obtained the Record Fragment.

BeforeDetail: Return to the center of the Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: Return to the center of the Stella Party.
CompleteDetail: The completed Storybook forms in your hands.

QuestName: First Ending: The Story’s End, or Its Beginning
BeforeDetail: Open the completed Storybook.
ProgressDetail: Listen to Sean and Dan’s final guidance.
CompleteDetail: Shards of the Library — Part I Complete

BeforeDetail: Let’s visit Joey at Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Joey at Stella Party.
CompleteDetail: Joey at Stella Party says his story has once again been severed from its connection and asks you to investigate.

BeforeDetail: Let’s visit Casandra at Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Casandra at Stella Party.
CompleteDetail: Casandra reveals that her story was suddenly disconnected a few days ago and suspects something has happened to her counterpart aboard the Chronos.

BeforeDetail: Casandra at Stella Party has something to say.
ProgressDetail: Ask Lilis aboard the Chronos about Captain Casandra’s whereabouts.
CompleteDetail: Lilis explains that Joey appeared days ago, spoke privately with Casandra, entrusted the ship to her, and then left with the Captain into the Void.

BeforeDetail: Lilis wishes to speak with you.
ProgressDetail: Lilis asks you to cross beyond the Void to search for Casandra. Head into the Void.
CompleteDetail: You discover Joey and Casandra drifting within the Void.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Casandra in the Void.
ProgressDetail: Casandra floats through the Void with an empty expression. Her condition resembles what once happened to Joey.
CompleteDetail: Void-Casandra shows no trace of her soul.
FindKeywardTarget: Speak with Casandra in the Void.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Casandra at Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: Stella Party’s Casandra hands you her Star Fragment and asks you to deliver it to her Void self.
CompleteDetail: You give the fragment to Casandra in the Void, but she shows no reaction.

BeforeDetail: Return to Casandra at Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: She explains that her Captain Casandra storyline appears to have shattered.
CompleteDetail: She asks you to recover the fragments of her story — the Captain’s Hat, Coat, and Telescope.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Lilis aboard the Chronos.
ProgressDetail: Lilis reports that three strange anomalies were observed days ago and believes they may be the scattered fragments of the Captain’s story.
CompleteDetail: Lilis shares the locations of the story fragments with you.

BeforeDetail: Ask Fergus aboard the Chronos about the compass.
ProgressDetail: Fergus explains the Captain left the compass with him for repairs. It is unfinished, and he asks you to bring five nails.
CompleteDetail: Fergus completes the repairs and gives you the restored compass.

BeforeDetail: Ask the sailor Erik about the Captain’s telescope.
ProgressDetail: Erik says he found the telescope in storage. Strangely, it only shows stars no matter where he points it. He has no use for it and gives it to you.
CompleteDetail: You receive the telescope from Erik.

BeforeDetail: Ask Camila, surviving in the zombie world, about the Captain’s hat.
ProgressDetail: Camila says she saw a strange zombie wearing an unusual captain’s hat a few days ago.
CompleteDetail: You defeat the zombie and recover the Captain’s hat.

BeforeDetail: Return to Stella Party’s Casandra with the three story fragments.
ProgressDetail: Casandra gathers the fragments and transforms them into a written Star Fragment. Deliver it to Captain Casandra aboard the Chronos.
CompleteDetail: The Star Fragment is restored to Captain Casandra.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Captain Casandra aboard the Chronos.
ProgressDetail: The Captain admits she was thrilled to step outside her story, but learned the Outside is not safe. She thanks you for bringing her back. Return to Stella Party’s Casandra.
CompleteDetail: Stella Party’s Casandra reveals she observed Joey in the Void — he was heading toward the Winter Camp.

BeforeDetail: Hear about Joey from Casandra.
ProgressDetail: Travel to the Winter Camp, the first story.
CompleteDetail: Strangely, a warm season appears where the Winter Camp should be frozen.

BeforeDetail: Ask Darius about the situation.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Darius about what has happened.
CompleteDetail: Darius says a man wearing unfamiliar clothes introduced himself as Joey and spoke with him a few days ago.

BeforeDetail: Continue speaking with Darius.
ProgressDetail: Ask Darius more about Joey.
CompleteDetail: Darius explains he complained about the cold. Joey seemed thoughtful, said he would “fix it,” then disappeared. At that moment, the snow began to melt.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Ivy.
ProgressDetail: Ivy says the spirits have grown unstable as winter melts and asks you to check on the Ice Spirit.
CompleteDetail: You agree to investigate the Ice Spirit’s condition.

BeforeDetail: Speak with the Ice Spirit.
ProgressDetail: The Ice Spirit warns that this world must remain a cold winter. If winter disappears, it will fade, and the Fire Spirit will lose control.
CompleteDetail: The Ice Spirit asks you to look after the Fire Spirit.

BeforeDetail: Speak with the Fire Spirit.
ProgressDetail: The Fire Spirit is overwhelmed with excessive power, lava spreading around it. It asks for help and suggests Ivy may know what to do.
CompleteDetail: The Fire Spirit continues struggling, awaiting Ivy’s guidance.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Ivy again.
ProgressDetail: Ivy explains this world’s balance is built upon eternal winter. Summer has shattered that equilibrium. She believes an ancient ritual may restore winter, but she does not know its exact workings. Knowing you are the Storykeeper, she asks you to seek the ancient practitioner and obtain the Circle of Restoration.
CompleteDetail: Go speak with Leon.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Leon.
ProgressDetail: Leon says he knows the ritual. It requires 10 Blue Herbs, 10 Red Herbs, and 10 Green Herbs arranged in harmony before performing the ceremony.
CompleteDetail: Deliver the ritual and materials to Ivy.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Ivy.
ProgressDetail: Ivy says the Fire Spirit’s power must be slightly restrained before the ritual. She asks you to collect 5 Ice Crystals.
CompleteDetail: You deliver the Ice Crystals to the Fire Spirit.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Ivy.
ProgressDetail: Ivy begins performing the ritual, chanting a song about the origin of this world.
CompleteDetail: The ritual echoes through the very foundation of the story.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Ivy.
ProgressDetail: Ivy says the ritual has succeeded and asks you to check on the Fire Spirit.
CompleteDetail: The Fire Spirit now appears calm and at peace.

BeforeDetail: The Ice Spirit has something to say.
ProgressDetail: The Ice Spirit says that when you previously helped the Moonlight Spirit, it sensed her flow. However, her energy has weakened in recent days and asks you to investigate.
CompleteDetail: After speaking with the Ice Spirit, head to the Moonlight Spirit.

BeforeDetail: Go speak with Reina.
ProgressDetail: Ask Reina about the condition of the lake.
CompleteDetail: Reina says the lake has grown unusually dark lately. A few days ago, she overheard the Dark Witch speaking with someone.

BeforeDetail: Find Celine.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Celine.
CompleteDetail: Celine admits that Joey visited her a few days ago.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Celine again.
ProgressDetail: Ask Celine about what happened.
CompleteDetail: Celine says Joey taught her the theory of Void magic. She tried using it for the first time, but the darkness became uncontrollable. She wonders if Hades, the god of darkness, might know how to contain it.

BeforeDetail: Visit Hades.
ProgressDetail: Hades explains that to control overwhelming darkness, a vessel is required. He asks you to gather 1 Fox Orb, 10 Dark Flowers, and 10 Luna Flowers.
CompleteDetail: Hades infuses the energy of Luna Flowers and Underworld Flowers into the Fox Orb, creating a vessel capable of containing the power of darkness.

BeforeDetail: Deliver the vessel to Celine.
ProgressDetail: Give Celine the vessel that can contain the darkness.
CompleteDetail: Using the orb as a medium, Celine casts Void magic. The darkness covering the Luna Flowers slowly begins to fade.

BeforeDetail: Ask Celine about Joey’s whereabouts.
ProgressDetail: Continue speaking with Celine about Joey.
CompleteDetail: Celine says Joey saw and heard many things while in the Void. There, he learned how to wield its power.

BeforeDetail: Celine asks for your help.
ProgressDetail: Celine hopes to enter the Void herself. The dimensional gate and magic circle are prepared, but she lacks materials. Bring her one bottle of Stella Essence. (Obtainable through the “Star Essence” skill or by trading 1 Milk and 1 Diamond with Hera at the temple.)
CompleteDetail: Celine steps through the dimensional gate into the Void.

BeforeDetail: After Celine crosses into the Void, the sun suddenly rises over Luna Lake. Go into the Void and speak with her.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Void-Celine.
CompleteDetail: Celine realizes that once she left her story, the narrative she belonged to began collapsing. She understands that her existence is necessary for it to continue.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Void-Celine.
ProgressDetail: Celine explains that Luna Lake requires her presence for the moon to rise, yet she wishes to remain in the Void to study magic. She discovers a cloning spell that allows her to divide her memories, leaving a version behind at the lake. Collect 10 Ice Crystals.
CompleteDetail: Celine prepares to divide her memories and create a copy to remain in Luna Lake.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Void-Celine.
ProgressDetail: Continue speaking with Void-Celine.
CompleteDetail: Celine decides to create a duplicate of herself — one without the memories of the Void and the knowledge she gained there.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Celine at Luna Lake.
ProgressDetail: Lake-Celine has no memory of the Void. She gazes at the sky and whispers that the moon shines brighter because she is here.
CompleteDetail: Lake-Celine remains unaware of the Void, peacefully continuing her role within the story.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Celine at Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: Stella Party’s Celine senses that her story has split into two paths.
CompleteDetail: She confirms that one of her narratives has branched. As the conversation ends, Nick from Stella Party approaches.

BeforeDetail: Nick at Stella Party wishes to speak.
ProgressDetail: Talk with Nick at Stella Party.
CompleteDetail: Stella Party’s Nick says that the storyline of his demonic counterpart feels faint and unstable.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Vampire Nick at the church.
ProgressDetail: Vampire Nick no longer appears demonic.
CompleteDetail: He says Joey visited him a few days ago and they had a long conversation.

BeforeDetail: Speak again with Nick at the church.
ProgressDetail: Nick explains Joey asked him what his deepest wish was. He answered that he wanted to become human. Joey handed him a piece of paper and said that tearing it would grant that wish.
CompleteDetail: Nick tore the paper without hesitation. The next morning, he had become human.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Nick at the church.
ProgressDetail: Human Nick says he keeps dreaming of a place that is not here. He feels uncertain whether those memories are truly his or merely dreams.
CompleteDetail: Go speak with Nick in Joiville.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Nick in Joiville.
ProgressDetail: Joiville’s Nick says he has been having strange dreams — standing in a church much like his own, speaking with Emily dressed as a nun. When he wakes, he feels unsure whether the dream was reality or the reality was the dream.
CompleteDetail: Return to the church’s Nick.

BeforeDetail: Return to Nick at the church.
ProgressDetail: Church Nick appears to be asleep. When shaken awake, he looks confused and asks where he is — it is Joiville’s Nick who has awakened in this body.
CompleteDetail: The identities seem to be crossing.

BeforeDetail: Check on Nick at the church between 10 PM and 8 AM.
ProgressDetail: Church Nick awakens as Joiville’s Nick. He marvels at how vivid the “dream” feels and asks you to help him wake from it.
CompleteDetail: Seek help from Nick at Stella Party.
FindKeywardTarget: Check on Nick at the church between 10 PM and 8 AM.

BeforeDetail: Ask Stella Party’s Nick for help.
ProgressDetail: He explains the two Nicks share the same soul. The only thing separating them was their narrative concept. Now that those concepts overlap, confusion occurs.
CompleteDetail: He concludes that Church Nick must return to being a vampire.

BeforeDetail: Visit Church Nick between 8 AM and 10 PM.
ProgressDetail: Church Nick seems restored to himself. You explain that to resolve the instability, he must become a vampire again — remaining human will eventually destroy both souls.
CompleteDetail: Nick says he made the choice to be human to stay with Emily. If he dies as a human, it would be meaningless. He believes Kelly may be able to help him return.
FindKeywardTarget: Visit Church Nick between 8 AM and 10 PM.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Kelly, the Vampire Queen.
ProgressDetail: Kelly already senses Nick’s condition. She asks if he is certain about returning to his demonic nature. Nick confirms. Kelly gives him an essence containing vampiric power. His wings and fangs begin to reappear.
CompleteDetail: Nick returns as a vampire, appearing more alive than ever. Kelly smiles and says he has finally learned how to survive.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Church Nick.
ProgressDetail: Nick explains that as a vampire, he once survived only on magic and blood. But during his time as a human, he learned to eat food — and now he can restore magic through meals.
CompleteDetail: Vampire Nick has learned to recover magic through food.

QuestName: A Toast to a New Beginning
BeforeDetail: Speak with Emily at the church.
ProgressDetail: Emily is grateful that Nick can now live beside her without fear. She wishes to prepare a feast. Provide 10 Meat and 10 Bottles of Wine.
CompleteDetail: Emily says none of this would have been possible without Kelly and wishes to invite her to the feast.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Kelly, the Vampire Queen.
ProgressDetail: Kelly is surprised by the invitation but attends. Everyone gathers to share the meal. Seeing Nick happily eating, Kelly smiles warmly. Raymor shyly thanks Kelly for coming and offers her food. Kelly, moved, raises her glass for a toast.
CompleteDetail: The feast strengthens bonds between them all.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Nick at Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: Talk with Stella Party’s Nick.
CompleteDetail: Stella Party’s Nick says his story feels brighter and more stable than before. At that moment, your phone begins to vibrate.

BeforeDetail: Check the message on your phone.
ProgressDetail: A message has arrived from Syra in the Zombie World.
CompleteDetail: You read the message.
FindKeywardTarget: Check the message on your phone.

BeforeDetail: Go speak with Syra.
ProgressDetail: Syra says Joey visited her a few days ago. He asked if she needed anything. She told him she had learned through Lilis that other worlds exist and that she was searching for a way to contact them. Joey gave her the Celestial Compass, and through it, she claims she can communicate with constellations of other worlds.
CompleteDetail: As she speaks, Syra seems unstable, as if something is overwhelming her.

BeforeDetail: Continue speaking with Syra.
ProgressDetail: Syra admits that after obtaining the Celestial Compass, she became obsessed with peering into other worlds. She has learned too many truths, and the flood of information is crushing her.
CompleteDetail: She struggles under the weight of knowledge.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Syra again.
ProgressDetail: Syra says she cannot endure this information and plans to transfer it into her phone. After glimpsing both ancient rituals and modern science, she has drafted a blueprint based on immense knowledge — but it requires precise engineering. She has been waiting for Joey, yet he never returned after giving her the relic.
CompleteDetail: Take the blueprint to Joey in Joiville.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey in Joiville.
ProgressDetail: Ask Joey to examine the blueprint.
CompleteDetail: Joey says he has never seen circuitry like this before — but somehow, he understands what to do. He constructs a special device.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey in Joiville.
ProgressDetail: Joey explains that according to the design, the machine appears to extract the user’s memories. However, the blueprint requires something called “story,” and without it, the device cannot function here.
CompleteDetail: The device is completed but cannot activate in this world.

BeforeDetail: Return to Syra in the Zombie World.
ProgressDetail: Syra activates the machine. Words begin swirling around her, drawn into the device.
CompleteDetail: The machine finishes operating, but Syra collapses and fails to regain consciousness.

BeforeDetail: Words still drift around her unconscious body.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Syra at Stella Party.
CompleteDetail: Stella Party’s Syra says part of her story has been torn away, and her avatar is now in danger. Yet she continues to record and observe her counterpart, protecting her. She hands you a Star Fragment from her dress.

BeforeDetail: Give the Star Fragment to Syra in the Zombie World.
ProgressDetail: Deliver the fragment.
CompleteDetail: Syra regains consciousness. Her overwhelming memories appear gone. However, the information transmitted by the device glows brightly within her phone.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Syra in the Zombie World.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Syra in the Zombie World.
CompleteDetail: She searches through the information, tracking clues about the vaccine’s whereabouts.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Syra again.
ProgressDetail: Continue speaking with her.
CompleteDetail: Syra discovers a devastating truth — there is no vaccine.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Syra in the Zombie World.
ProgressDetail: Continue speaking with her.
CompleteDetail: Though there is no vaccine, Syra says there may still be a treatment. Her expression regains hope.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Syra at Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: Continue speaking with Stella Party’s Syra.
CompleteDetail: She explains that some stories are unavoidable. Her narrative is built upon a zombie world setting — a world where a vaccine does not exist. “A world with treatment but no cure… a contradiction. But isn’t that exactly what makes it a story?”

BeforeDetail: Joey at Stella Party wishes to speak.
ProgressDetail: Stella Party’s Joey says Leon has reported seeing Joey within his story.
CompleteDetail: Travel to the Animal Forest.

BeforeDetail: Find Leon in the Animal Forest.
ProgressDetail: Approach Joey.
CompleteDetail: You finally locate Joey. Speak with him.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey.
ProgressDetail: Continue your conversation with him.
CompleteDetail: Joey explains what he experienced in the Void. He says he no longer wishes to belong to a story. Instead, he wants to become a Recorder — to write his own story.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Leon.
ProgressDetail: Continue your discussion with Leon.
CompleteDetail: Leon reveals that his story is one of the primordial narratives. He has long been aware of the Void’s existence.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Leon again.
ProgressDetail: Continue speaking with Leon.
CompleteDetail: Leon explains why he never crossed into the Void. If he disappears, his story ceases to exist — and that would mean the collapse of this world. Other characters might simply move to another story, but Leon’s is one of the primal foundations. Without it, later stories cannot exist. Thus, primordial beings carry the responsibility of sustaining their narrative. Leon suggests seeking Hades, another protagonist of a primordial story, who may offer guidance.

BeforeDetail: Go speak with Hades.
ProgressDetail: Continue speaking with Hades.
CompleteDetail: Hades explains that stories exist because of protagonists, but protagonists also exist because of stories. Just as gods exist because humans believe in them, divinity itself is a construct born of narrative.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Hades again.
ProgressDetail: Continue speaking with Hades.
CompleteDetail: Hades says that with divinity, one can experience the gaze of the observer. Yet becoming an observer also brings the faint awareness that one is being observed by another.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Hades once more.
ProgressDetail: Continue the discussion with Hades.
CompleteDetail: Hades tells Joey that if he truly wishes to obtain authentic divinity, he must meet his own observer.

BeforeDetail: Joey wishes to speak with his true self.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Joey at Stella Party.
CompleteDetail: Stella Party’s Joey says he cannot leave his position recklessly. There must be narrative plausibility — a proper reason for such a meeting.

BeforeDetail: Continue speaking with Joey at Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: Ask Joey how two worlds may be connected.
CompleteDetail: He explains that a medium linking the two worlds is required. He asks you to find a story related to such a bridge.

QuestName: A Tale That Connects Two Worlds
BeforeDetail: Speak with Iris at the library.
ProgressDetail: Ask Iris about stories that connect two worlds.
CompleteDetail: Iris tells you about the legend of the Ojakgyo — the bridge formed by magpies.

BeforeDetail: Inform Joey in the Void about the Ojakgyo.
ProgressDetail: Void-Joey says the ritual requires two kinds of feathers. Seek Rio for assistance.
CompleteDetail: Go speak with Rio.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Rio.
ProgressDetail: Grateful for your past help, Rio lends you one white feather and one black feather.
CompleteDetail: Return to Joey in the Void. He says the materials are ready, but Celine’s duplication magic is required.

BeforeDetail: Ask Celine for help.
ProgressDetail: Celine casts a spell upon the two feathers. Bring the enchanted feathers back to the Void.
CompleteDetail: With Celine’s power, a Crow Spirit is created. Return to Joey in the Void.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey in the Void.
ProgressDetail: Joey says preparations here are complete. He keeps the white feather and gives you the black feather. Deliver it to Joey at Stella Party.
CompleteDetail: After receiving the black feather, Stella Party’s Joey says everything is ready and steps into the Void.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey in the Void.
ProgressDetail: Joey finally stands before his true self.
CompleteDetail: The Observer — the true self, a self-luminous star — asks Joey what he truly wishes to become.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Void-Joey.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Void-Joey.
CompleteDetail: Joey says he is tired of merely following the flow of a story. He wants to record the stories he chooses — to become a Recorder.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Void-Joey.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Void-Joey.
CompleteDetail: The true self says he will not stop Joey if he wishes to become a Recorder. But if Joey disappears from his story, the Old Village and everyone within it will cease to exist. That world will collapse.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey at Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: Continue speaking with him.
CompleteDetail: Stella Party’s Joey tells you that before becoming a Recorder, he must properly conclude his story.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey.
ProgressDetail: Joey tries to write a new story but cannot yet grasp how. He decides instead to remake an old folktale and asks you to retrieve one from the library.
CompleteDetail: You obtain The Sun and Moon Siblings.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey.
ProgressDetail: Joey explains that to complete this story, several “ingredients” are needed.
CompleteDetail: He says he needs the Tiger’s Essence and the Moon’s Essence. First, seek Blake in the Animal Forest for the tiger’s power.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Blake in the Animal Forest.
ProgressDetail: Blake willingly agrees to share his strength.
CompleteDetail: After muttering quietly to himself, Blake hands you a scroll imbued with his essence.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Reina at Luna Lake.
ProgressDetail: Reina says she can imbue her power, but you must bring her 10 Luna Flowers.
CompleteDetail: You receive the Moonlight Essence. Deliver it to Joey in the Void.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey in the Void.
ProgressDetail: Joey asks Sage Jun for help and passes him Blake’s essence.
CompleteDetail: Jun quietly asks if Joey is leaving. There is a trace of farewell in his voice.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey.
ProgressDetail: Joey seeks Nora’s help and gives her the Moon’s Essence.
CompleteDetail: Nora says, “We’ll meet again someday,” and agrees to help rewrite the story.

BeforeDetail: Visit Iris in the Old Village.
ProgressDetail: Joey tells Iris he has found a way to cure her illness — but it requires a goodbye.
CompleteDetail: Joey says everything is ready and prepares to begin the story of The Sun and Moon Siblings.

QuestName: If You Give Me a Rice Cake…
BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey to begin the story.
ProgressDetail: As Joey opens the book and the Storykeeper (the Player) begins reading, the air shifts and night falls. In the distance, a tiger’s roar echoes. Run through the darkness and escape the tiger.
CompleteDetail: Fleeing from the tiger, you reach a dead end.

BeforeDetail: Arrive at the cliff’s edge.
ProgressDetail: Cornered at the precipice, Joey calls out to the moon for help. The moon answers: one must be sacrificed so the other may live. Joey tells Iris to live well in the moonlight, then casts himself into the cliff’s luminous glow.
CompleteDetail: Iris ascends with the moonlight, reborn as the Goddess of Moonlight. The spell placed upon Jun is lifted, and he returns to human form.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Jun in the Old Village.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Jun once more.
CompleteDetail: When all is finished, neither Joey nor Iris can be seen in the village. Their story has closed — but it has not vanished.

BeforeDetail: Enter the Void and speak with Joey.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Void-Joey.
CompleteDetail: Joey says Iris has awakened as a goddess, so no illness will ever trouble her again. He smiles faintly, saying he will one day return to ask about her well-being. Then, from behind him, slow applause echoes — his true self appears.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey at Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Joey’s true self.
CompleteDetail: The true self says it was an impressive conclusion. With this, even if Joey departs, the story will remain stable. From within himself, he draws out Joey’s original story — now condensed into a star made of written words — and hands it to him.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Joey at Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Recorder Joey.
CompleteDetail: As Joey fully accepts his story, his eyes seem to gaze beyond another dimension. The true self congratulates him on attaining a new rank and encourages him to write well as a Recorder before quietly departing.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Recorder Joey.
ProgressDetail: Continue the conversation.
CompleteDetail: He looks at the Player and says,“Now I understand. I finally see why you are free from the story. You were never bound by it. You came from outside all of this.”

BeforeDetail: Speak with Recorder Joey.
ProgressDetail: Continue speaking with him.
CompleteDetail: He says he now knows there are worlds beyond this one, and he wishes to record stories that exist beyond even the Void. He promises that if he learns anything about your grandfather, he will return to tell you. Then, without hesitation, he steps beyond the Void — and disappears.

BeforeDetail: A message arrives on your phone with no sender ID. It contains only one short line: “Meet me in the Void.”
ProgressDetail: A message arrives on your phone with no sender ID. It contains only one short line: “Meet me in the Void.”
CompleteDetail: The message feels familiar—almost like it was sent by Joey. Head into the Void to uncover the truth.

BeforeDetail: Joey tells you that this place is no longer just the Void, but something deeper and fractured.
ProgressDetail: You follow him into a silent rift within the Void where reality feels unstable.
CompleteDetail: Inside the gap, you discover distortions that look like traces of time slipping out of alignment.

BeforeDetail: Joey explains that he never directly met Chronos.
ProgressDetail: ou ask him what he actually encountered beyond the Void.
CompleteDetail: Joey says he found a way to trace Chronos not by meeting him, but by following the marks he left behind.

BeforeDetail: Somewhere in the Void, remnants of Chronos’ presence remain.
ProgressDetail: You investigate the faint traces scattered across the fractured space.
CompleteDetail: You uncover fragmented records suggesting Chronos is not merely a character, but a being who designed worlds.

BeforeDetail: Joey believes the compass aboard the Chronos will react.
ProgressDetail: Investigate the compass.
CompleteDetail: The compass vibrates subtly, not pointing to coordinates but to something far beyond navigation.

BeforeDetail: The mirror fragments resonate with the compass.
ProgressDetail: Collect the scattered mirror shards within the Void.
CompleteDetail: The shards align, forming a single reflection.What appears is not a timeline…but the gaze of an observer.

BeforeDetail: Joey reveals a fragment of memory lingering in his palm.
ProgressDetail: You examine the memory and attempt to understand its origin.
CompleteDetail: The memory is revealed to be artificially constructed, and within it appears a single name — Chronos.

BeforeDetail: Joey insists that the final answers lie aboard the Chronos ship.
ProgressDetail: You return to the ship to investigate the anomaly further.
CompleteDetail: Captain Cassandra senses something wrong with the compass, as if it has changed its purpose.

BeforeDetail: Cassandra explains that the compass is no longer searching for location data.
ProgressDetail: You speak with her and analyze the direction it indicates.
CompleteDetail: The compass is not pointing toward the edge of the world, but beyond it — outside the world entirely.

BeforeDetail: There is a concealed chamber somewhere inside the Chronos ship.
ProgressDetail: You locate and investigate the hidden space within the vessel.
CompleteDetail: Inside, you discover ancient design records revealing that the story was never accidental, but intentionally constructed from the very beginning.

BeforeDetail: Cassandra says the internal structure of the compass is changing.
ProgressDetail: Examine the compass closely together with Cassandra.
CompleteDetail: You discover an inscription engraved at its core: “Coordinates hold meaning only when an observer exists.”

BeforeDetail: The mirror fragments are resonating intensely with the compass.
ProgressDetail: Activate the source of the resonance.
CompleteDetail: Light spreads outward, revealing a portion of Chronos’ navigation records.

BeforeDetail: The resonance reveals an ancient voyage log.
ProgressDetail: Analyze the recovered log.
CompleteDetail: Within the record, a single line stands out: “This world was designed.”

BeforeDetail: Joey says something about the beginning of this world feels unnatural.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Joey about the world’s origin.
CompleteDetail: Joey asks quietly, “Do you remember the day we first began to move?”

BeforeDetail: The compass begins pointing somewhere outside the known timeline.
ProgressDetail: Trace the direction indicated by the compass.
CompleteDetail: The direction does not lead to another era, but toward something beyond the world — the seat of observation.

BeforeDetail: Perhaps the answer lies beyond the story, at Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: Travel to Stella Party.
CompleteDetail: Sean and Dan are already waiting for you.

BeforeDetail: Sean seems unusually quiet compared to his usual demeanor.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Sean.
CompleteDetail: Sean answers briefly, “Every window is opened for someone.”

QuestName: Sean answers briefly, “Every window is opened for someone.”
BeforeDetail: A new archive section has appeared deep within the library.
ProgressDetail: Investigate the newly discovered archive.
CompleteDetail: Inside, you find records of the Player’s choices carefully preserved.

BeforeDetail: Some of the recorded sentences should not exist within this world.
ProgressDetail: Examine the anomalous text.
CompleteDetail: One line reads clearly: “When the player leaves, the world stops.”

BeforeDetail: The Name Beneath Time
ProgressDetail: Attempt to restore the missing name.
CompleteDetail: Beneath the faded ink, a single name emerges — “Chronos.”

BeforeDetail: Deep within the library shelves, ancient records are discovered, and among untouched books there are strange empty gaps.
ProgressDetail: Investigate the blank spaces between the records.
CompleteDetail: Within the emptiness, you find erased sentences, and one line remains faintly visible: “This memory was inserted.”

BeforeDetail: The records of your past show signs of having been altered.
ProgressDetail: Reconstruct the memory scene and examine it closely.
CompleteDetail: Portions of your childhood memory cut off unnaturally, as if someone appended them later.

BeforeDetail: Sean does not immediately answer your questions.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Sean.
CompleteDetail: Sean quietly says, “Not every memory is voluntary.”

BeforeDetail: Dan has concealed a fragment of record.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Dan and examine the fragment.
CompleteDetail: The fragment references the name of the Designer.

BeforeDetail: Investigate the records concerning the ‘grandfather’ you remember.
ProgressDetail: Re-examine the memory from the past.
CompleteDetail: The memory contains no emotional residue, existing more like a preset parameter than a lived experience.

BeforeDetail: Within the records, you discover sentences written in identical handwriting.
ProgressDetail: Trace the origin of the writing.
CompleteDetail: The sentence concludes with the words: “The observer is part of the design.”

BeforeDetail: The mirror fragments begin to react once again.
ProgressDetail: Look into the mirror carefully.
CompleteDetail: Reflected within is not merely a character, but the presence of the Player.

BeforeDetail: During the memory reconstruction, the timeline begins to destabilize.
ProgressDetail: Investigate the center of the fracture.
CompleteDetail: It becomes clear that time itself began to flow from the moment you intervened.

BeforeDetail: Deep within the library, you discover a blueprint.
ProgressDetail: Analyze the design carefully.
CompleteDetail: The blueprint includes a designated entry labeled “Player.”

BeforeDetail: Joey quietly asks you something.
ProgressDetail: Speak with him.
CompleteDetail: Joey’s question is simple yet heavy: “Do we exist… because you are reading us?”

BeforeDetail: You must return to where everything began, as the winter world of M1 is being called once again.
ProgressDetail: Travel to the Winter Camp.
CompleteDetail: Winter still exists, but something feels slightly misaligned.

BeforeDetail: A warmth that does not belong lingers within the winter world.
ProgressDetail: Investigate the unusual traces of climate disturbance.
CompleteDetail: A faint residue of summer remains.

BeforeDetail: The Ice Spirit emits an unstable aura.
ProgressDetail: Speak with the Ice Spirit.
CompleteDetail: The spirit says, “He shook the seasons… and you restored them.”

BeforeDetail: Traces remain from the moment the world was turned into summer.
ProgressDetail: Locate the center of the fracture.
CompleteDetail: At its core lingers the Void power once used by Joey.

BeforeDetail: The soul forms of Stella Party observed these changes from above.
ProgressDetail: Travel to Stella Party.
CompleteDetail: They say, “Time began to flow the moment you intervened.”

BeforeDetail: Sean and Dan present the recorded logs.
ProgressDetail: Examine the records carefully.
CompleteDetail: You discover that after the Player’s first choice, the world’s state values began to fluctuate.

BeforeDetail: The timeline trembles in instability.
ProgressDetail: Restore balance to the fractured time flow.
CompleteDetail: The world stabilizes once more, and time continues to move forward.

BeforeDetail: The compass begins reacting intensely.
ProgressDetail: Activate the compass.
CompleteDetail: The compass no longer points to a temporal coordinate, but toward the point of observation.

BeforeDetail: Reviewing the records reveals that all disturbances trace back to a single moment.
ProgressDetail: Identify that moment.
CompleteDetail: That day was the day the Player first entered this world.

BeforeDetail: All records converge toward a single name.
ProgressDetail: Reflect upon that name.
CompleteDetail: Chronos — not the one who created time, but the one who caused it to flow.

BeforeDetail: The mirror shard discovered in the Void begins reacting once again.
ProgressDetail: Stand before the mirror.
CompleteDetail: Reflected within is not a character, but the gaze of the Player.

BeforeDetail: The surface of the mirror twists and the image begins to shake.
ProgressDetail: Examine the distorted reflection.
CompleteDetail: Instead of a scene from the world, a fragment of the game’s UI briefly flickers across the surface.

BeforeDetail: Joey finally voices a question he has long kept silent.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Joey.
CompleteDetail: Joey says quietly, “Maybe we move… because someone is watching.”

BeforeDetail: The air inside the library feels strangely heavy.
ProgressDetail: Confirm the situation with Sean and Dan.
CompleteDetail: Dan admits, “This world… is being read.”

BeforeDetail: An unseen gaze can be felt from the upper level of the library.
ProgressDetail: Ascend to the upper floor.
CompleteDetail: No one is there, yet the records continue to update.

BeforeDetail: The pages of a book begin turning on their own.
ProgressDetail: Examine the opened page.
CompleteDetail: Choices that were never selected are recorded, as if someone already knew them in advance.

BeforeDetail: The compass spins aimlessly, having lost its direction.
ProgressDetail: Attempt to stabilize the compass.
CompleteDetail: The compass no longer points within the world, but toward the seat of observation.

BeforeDetail: Joey remains silent for a long moment.
ProgressDetail: Listen to what he is thinking.
CompleteDetail: Joey says, “I was a character… but you… you are the reader.”

BeforeDetail: A hidden design document is discovered deep within the library.
ProgressDetail: Investigate the archived design files.
CompleteDetail: The document describes not only the structure of the world, but a design that assumes the intervention of an observer.

BeforeDetail: Joey asks one final question.
ProgressDetail: Speak with him.
CompleteDetail: Joey’s voice trembles as he asks, “If you leave… will we stop?”

BeforeDetail: A World Without Pain
ProgressDetail: Observe the other world unfolding within the Void.
CompleteDetail: In that world, no one is hurt, and no one feels sorrow.

BeforeDetail: Everything appears perfect.
ProgressDetail: Observe the inhabitants of this world.
CompleteDetail: They are smiling… but they are not moving.

BeforeDetail: Time does not flow here.
ProgressDetail: Examine the environment for signs of change.
CompleteDetail: There is no wind, no seasons, no choices — it is perfect, yet suffocating.

BeforeDetail: This world is sustained in a state of complete suspension.
ProgressDetail: Investigate the source that maintains this stillness.
CompleteDetail: The source is the absence of observation — because no one is watching, nothing happens.

BeforeDetail: Memories exist here, but nothing evolves.
ProgressDetail: Check the recorded history of this world.
CompleteDetail: Not a single new line has been written.

BeforeDetail: Joey gestures toward this world and asks you something.
ProgressDetail: Speak with him.
CompleteDetail: Joey says quietly, “If there is no pain… there is no growth either.”

BeforeDetail: Joey falls silent for a moment.
ProgressDetail: Listen to what he is thinking.
CompleteDetail: Listen to what he is thinking.

BeforeDetail: A small fracture appears within the utopia.
ProgressDetail: Investigate the crack.
CompleteDetail: Flowing through the fracture is something unexpected — time.

BeforeDetail: You discover the design documents for this world.
ProgressDetail: Analyze the blueprint.
CompleteDetail: The design reads: “No observer / No choices / No change.”

BeforeDetail: Joey asks one final question.
ProgressDetail: Listen carefully to him.
CompleteDetail: Joey’s voice is steady but heavy: “A world without sorrow… without joy. Would you still choose it?”

BeforeDetail: Deep within the library, another trace of the original design is discovered.
ProgressDetail: Investigate the design remnants.
CompleteDetail: Within the records, one word repeats again and again: “Observer.”

BeforeDetail: Sean and Dan say they will no longer conceal the truth.
ProgressDetail: Speak with the two librarians.
CompleteDetail: They confess quietly, “We only managed the structure.”

BeforeDetail: Joey seems to have connected the final pieces.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Joey.
CompleteDetail: Joey says, “We came alive the moment you began reading.”

BeforeDetail: The compass no longer trembles.
ProgressDetail: Examine the stabilized compass.
CompleteDetail: It points in only one direction — beyond the story.

BeforeDetail: All the mirror shards are ready to be restored.
ProgressDetail: Reassemble the mirror.
CompleteDetail: The mirror reflects not the world, but the game screen itself.

BeforeDetail: The image within the mirror stabilizes.
ProgressDetail: Gaze into the mirror.
CompleteDetail: Joey says quietly, “You are not a character. You are the reader.”

BeforeDetail: Joey remains silent for a long time.
ProgressDetail: Listen to his decision.
CompleteDetail: “I will become a Recorder,” he declares. “Not within the story — but beyond it.”

BeforeDetail: The pages of the library book turn on their own to the final chapter.
ProgressDetail: Examine the opened page.
CompleteDetail: A blank page appears — an ending not yet written.

BeforeDetail: Joey looks at the final page in silence.
ProgressDetail: Speak with him.
CompleteDetail: Joey says, “You don’t have to decide the ending. Reading it is enough.”

BeforeDetail: Everything grows quiet.
ProgressDetail: Prepare for the final choice.
CompleteDetail: The book cover begins to close slowly — but it does not lock.

BeforeDetail: Just before everything ends, Joey speaks to you one last time.
ProgressDetail: Have the final conversation with Joey.
CompleteDetail: “A story can end,” he says softly, “but memories remain.”

BeforeDetail: For a final farewell, you head to Stella Party.
ProgressDetail: Arrive at Stella Party.
CompleteDetail: The soul forms glow quietly in the starlight.

BeforeDetail: Beneath the stars, Joey slowly lifts his head.
ProgressDetail: Listen to his words.
CompleteDetail: “We only shined because you were there.”

BeforeDetail: The star shards begin to gather as one.
ProgressDetail: Combine all the shards.
CompleteDetail: A completed storybook takes physical form.

QuestName: A completed storybook takes physical form.
BeforeDetail: Joey accepts the seat of the Recorder.
ProgressDetail: Hand over the star shards.
CompleteDetail: Light seeps into Joey, merging with him.

BeforeDetail: A title begins engraving itself upon the cover.
ProgressDetail: Examine the completed book.
CompleteDetail: 《Shards of the Library — End of Season 3》

BeforeDetail: Black ink scatters through the air.
ProgressDetail: Watch the drifting ink.
CompleteDetail: The ink briefly forms words before fading away.

BeforeDetail: The compass trembles one final time.
ProgressDetail: Check the compass.
CompleteDetail: The needle comes to rest.

BeforeDetail: The book slowly begins to close.
ProgressDetail: Watch the closing pages.
CompleteDetail: The book shuts completely — but it does not lock.

BeforeDetail: In the darkness, Joey’s voice echoes faintly.
ProgressDetail: Listen to what he says.
CompleteDetail: “Whenever you wish to read again… the story will always open for you.”

BeforeDetail: Recorder Joey quietly looks at you.
ProgressDetail: Listen carefully to the question he asks.
CompleteDetail: “Why are you still reading this story until the very end?”

BeforeDetail: Joey is no longer a character within the story.
ProgressDetail: Watch as he walks toward the Void.
CompleteDetail: “He did not disappear — he simply stepped back.”

BeforeDetail: He almost says something, then stops.
ProgressDetail: A quiet silence fills the space.
CompleteDetail: His final words are never recorded.

BeforeDetail: The starlight of Stella Party begins to waver.
ProgressDetail: Watch the stars fade one by one.
CompleteDetail: “The stars did not go out — observation ceased.”

BeforeDetail: A small fragment of light remains behind.
ProgressDetail: Observe what becomes of it.
CompleteDetail: “It is a trace of the Recorder… but now, it belongs to you.”

BeforeDetail: Joey no longer stands close by.
ProgressDetail: Sense his distant presence.
CompleteDetail: “He observes… but no longer intervenes.”

BeforeDetail: The library records begin to reorganize themselves.
ProgressDetail: Check Joey’s entry in the archive.
CompleteDetail: “‘Character: Joey’ has vanished… but ‘Recorder’ remains.”

BeforeDetail: The world continues to move forward.
ProgressDetail: Look around you.
CompleteDetail: “The story did not end — only one volume was closed.”

BeforeDetail: After everything has ended, you return to the Joyville Library.
ProgressDetail: Enter the library.
CompleteDetail: The library appears unchanged.

BeforeDetail: The hall feels unnaturally silent.
ProgressDetail: Look around the central hall.
CompleteDetail: “Only your footsteps echo. No one speaks.”

BeforeDetail: Sean stands behind the counter.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Sean.
CompleteDetail: He nods quietly. “Did you enjoy reading the story?”

BeforeDetail: Dan closes a book in silence.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Dan.
CompleteDetail: “The record is complete,” he says, “but interpretation belongs to you.”

BeforeDetail: A mirror stands along one wall of the library.
ProgressDetail: Look into the mirror.
CompleteDetail: “This time, it reflects nothing unusual — only a still, silent image.”

BeforeDetail: Cassandra’s compass lies quietly on a desk.
ProgressDetail: Examine the compass.
CompleteDetail: “The needle no longer moves. The coordinates no longer tremble.”

BeforeDetail: A faint light lingers between the bookshelves.
ProgressDetail: Investigate the lingering trace.
CompleteDetail: “The Recorder has left… but the trace remains.”

BeforeDetail: Small letters appear along the page’s margin.
ProgressDetail: Read the marginal note carefully.
CompleteDetail: “Even when the record ends, the moment you read it — it begins again.”

BeforeDetail: A small sentence rests beneath the final page.
ProgressDetail: Read the sentence.
CompleteDetail: “Sometimes… remember this story.”

BeforeDetail: The UI quietly restores itself.
ProgressDetail: Check the menu screen.
CompleteDetail: “The game continues. The story has closed — but it is not locked.”

BeforeDetail: The main menu briefly flickers, revealing an option that should not exist.
ProgressDetail: Reopen the menu and check the anomalous entry.
CompleteDetail: A hidden tab appears for a moment — [System Residue Detected].

BeforeDetail: Small UI glitches begin appearing throughout the interface.
ProgressDetail: Collect system fragments from the map, inventory, and quest windows.
CompleteDetail: The fragments assemble into a single set of coordinates.

BeforeDetail: A hidden location becomes accessible.
ProgressDetail: Enter the Interface Room.
CompleteDetail: “There are no NPCs, no background — only floating UI windows.”

BeforeDetail: A warning message appears — Manual Override Available.
ProgressDetail: Temporarily suspend the system.
CompleteDetail: “All sound vanishes. The world freezes.”

BeforeDetail: Only one window remains active.
ProgressDetail: Open the final window.
CompleteDetail: “A single line appears — ‘Do you wish to continue observing?’”

BeforeDetail: The cursor moves slowly across the screen.
ProgressDetail: Select the ‘Close’ button.
CompleteDetail: “The screen fades to black. After three seconds, the title screen returns.”

BeforeDetail: You\'ve reached level 1 in the Blacksmith skill.
ProgressDetail: You\'ve reached level 1 in the Blacksmith skill.
CompleteDetail: You\'ve reached level 1in the Blacksmith skill.

BeforeDetail: After reaching Blacksmith level 3, go visit Fergus.
ProgressDetail: After reaching Blacksmith level 3, go visit Fergus.
CompleteDetail: After reaching Blacksmith level 3, go visit Fergus.

BeforeDetail: To unlock the new technique, you had to upgrade your hammer.
ProgressDetail: Fergus tells you that before you can learn the technique, you need to upgrade your hammer.
CompleteDetail: You brought 10 Iron Ingots and successfully enhanced your hammer.

BeforeDetail: Let’s try performing the upgrade yourself.
ProgressDetail: Use the hammer or talk to Fergus with the keyword “upgrade”,
CompleteDetail: You have learned the upgrade technique.

BeforeDetail: Kiri says she has something to teach you about livestock.
ProgressDetail: Purchase a chicken coop or barn from Kiri and place it on your farm.
CompleteDetail: After purchasing your first animal, return to Kiri and learn the Animal Affinity skill.

BeforeDetail: Kiri says if you\'re interested in egg gathering, come talk to her.
ProgressDetail: Kiri offers to teach you the Egg Gathering skill.
CompleteDetail: You brought an egg to Kiri and learned the Egg Gathering skill.

BeforeDetail: Sebastian says if you\'re interested in collecting milk, come talk to him.
ProgressDetail: Sebastian offers to teach you the Milking skill.
CompleteDetail: You gave the milk to Sebastian and learned the Milking skill.

BeforeDetail: Kelly says to talk to her if you\'re interested in starting combat training.
ProgressDetail: Joivillage is safe, but the wild beyond isn’t.
CompleteDetail: You hunted 5 rabbits.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Kelly to begin the next stage of training.
ProgressDetail: Hunt 5 deer using a bow.
CompleteDetail: You hunted 5 deer and learned the Bow Mastery skill.
FindKeywardTarget: it's crucial to take them out from a distance before drawing attention.

BeforeDetail: If you\'re interested in firearms, talk to Jade.
ProgressDetail: Kelly suggests that if you\'re interested in firearms, go speak with the hunter Jade.
CompleteDetail: You spoke with Jade about firearms.

BeforeDetail: Obtain a firearm license from Kai.
ProgressDetail: You’ll need a firearm license before you can use one.
CompleteDetail: You had a conversation with Kai.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Kai if you\'re interested in getting a firearm license.
ProgressDetail: Kai wants to see your skills before approving the license.
CompleteDetail: You hunted rats and obtained the firearm license.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Jade.
ProgressDetail: After the wolf hunt, show the firearm license to Jade.
CompleteDetail: You have learned the Firearm Mastery skill.

BeforeDetail: Receive the final training from Jade.
ProgressDetail: Jade congratulates you and gives you a basic firearm.
CompleteDetail: You completed the basic combat training by hunting 5 wolves.

BeforeDetail: Officer Vincent and Aria of the Joivillage police station offer special training for those seeking to enhance their combat skills.
ProgressDetail: Officer Vincent and Aria of the Joivillage police station offer special training for those seeking to enhance their combat skills.

BeforeDetail: You enrolled in a self-defense class with Vincent.
ProgressDetail: Sometimes you’ll find yourself surrounded by multiple enemies.
CompleteDetail: Talk to Vincent to learn the Windmill skill.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Aria.
ProgressDetail: Sometimes you’ll find yourself surrounded by multiple enemies.
CompleteDetail: Use the \"About the Skill\" keyword when speaking with Aria.

BeforeDetail: Use the \"About the Skill\" keyword when speaking with Aria.
ProgressDetail: Sometimes you’ll find yourself surrounded by multiple enemies.
CompleteDetail: You have learned the Evasion skill from Aria.

BeforeDetail: Aiden says if you want to learn how to safely make a campfire, come talk to him.
ProgressDetail: Aiden asks you to gather 5 pieces of wood so he can teach you how to build a fire safely.
CompleteDetail: You learned how to make a campfire from Aiden.

BeforeDetail: An urgent request for help has come from the fire station.
ProgressDetail: mall fires have recently been breaking out in the forest.
CompleteDetail: You extinguished early-stage fires in the forest and learned the Dash skill.
FindKeywardTarget: Use Water bucket on fire spot

BeforeDetail: Daniel says he\'s recently been having some trouble.
ProgressDetail: Daniel reports that aggressive crabs have been appearing more frequently on the beach.He asks you to reduce their numbers a bit.
CompleteDetail: After helping reduce the crab population, Daniel teaches you an escape techniqueuseful when being chased by nearby enemies.

BeforeDetail: Daniel says he often gets pinched while dealing with crabs, and that first aid skills are really useful in such cases.
ProgressDetail: Daniel suggests you meet Alex, the village nurse, who can teach you proper first aid.
CompleteDetail: Alex agrees to teach you the basics of first aid.

BeforeDetail: Alex says he’ll teach you about first aid.
ProgressDetail: To start your training, Alex asks you to gather 3 Green Herbs from the nearby forest.
CompleteDetail: You’ve learned the First Aid skill from Alex.

BeforeDetail: Syra says she needs help.
ProgressDetail: Syra says she lost her towel at the beach. She asks for help, saying she\'s too busy with work at the hospital to go and retrieve it.
CompleteDetail: I helped her find a towel. She taught me the rest skill.

BeforeDetail: Syra says she knows the perfect spot for a truly relaxing break.
ProgressDetail: At 5:50 PM, go to the beach spot Saira mentioned and use the Rest skill to enjoy the sunset.
CompleteDetail: As you watched the sunset at the beach Saira recommended, you unlocked the Golden Time skill.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Angela.
ProgressDetail: Angela says if you want to learn the Composure skill, try crafting a perfect cup of latte art and bring it to her.
CompleteDetail: You gave Angela a cup of latte with your art. She taught you the Composure skill in return.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Emily.
ProgressDetail: Emily says she will teach you the Meditation skill, but only after you\'ve reached level 3 in the Rest skill.
CompleteDetail: After showing your progress, Emily taught you the Meditation skill.
FindKeywardTarget: Reached level 3 in the Rest skiil.

BeforeDetail: You received a message from Officer Kai after completing Combat Training II.
ProgressDetail: Talk to Kai using the “About the Skill” keyword, then begin training.
CompleteDetail: You learned the “Hide” skill from Kai.
FindKeywardTarget: Use the "About the Skill" keyword when speaking with Kai.

BeforeDetail: Let’s receive the final lesson from Kai.
ProgressDetail: Bring Kai 10 pieces of wood and 10 stones.
CompleteDetail: You learned the “Restore” skill from Kai.

BeforeDetail: Bella says to visit her if you\'re interested in learning to play an instrument.
ProgressDetail: Talk to Bella using the keyword Busking,
CompleteDetail: You learned how to play musical instruments from Bella.

BeforeDetail: If you want to learn composition, go find Bella.
ProgressDetail: Bring one piece of paper and one ink bottle to Bella.
CompleteDetail: You learned the Composition skill from Bella.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Iris at the village library.
ProgressDetail: Visit Jenny and ask if she has any new stories or manuscripts.
CompleteDetail: Iris is concerned that no new books have been added to the library lately.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Jenny.
ProgressDetail: Visit Mia and ask for a piece of artwork that could inspire Jenny.
CompleteDetail: Jenny says she’s been struggling with her writing lately.

BeforeDetail: Speak with Mia.
ProgressDetail: Bring one piece of paper and one ink bottle to Mia.
CompleteDetail: You’ve learned how to sketch from Mia.

BeforeDetail: Start a conversation with Jenny.
ProgressDetail: Deliver one finished sketch to Jenny.
CompleteDetail: You’ve inspired Jenny’s writing.

BeforeDetail: Start a conversation with Iris.
ProgressDetail: Deliver a completed book and drawing to Iris.
CompleteDetail: You sold your creative works at a fair price.

BeforeDetail: Start a conversation with Ivy
ProgressDetail: Gather 5 White Mushrooms and 5 Green Herbs.
CompleteDetail: You delivered the wild ingredients to Ivy and learned the Gathering Mastery skill.

BeforeDetail: Ivy said to come back if you want to study herbology further
ProgressDetail: Ivy asks you to collect 3 Red Herbs and 3 Blue Herbs.
CompleteDetail: You learned basic knowledge of Herbology from Ivy.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Camila about Exploration
ProgressDetail: Complete one random mission from the Expedition Board.
CompleteDetail: You successfully completed a mission and were officially registered as an Explorer.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Lilis if you want to learn about relics.
ProgressDetail: Bring a relic you found while mining to Lilis.
CompleteDetail: You learned the Relic Appraisal skill from Lilis.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Rio if you\'re curious about gems.
ProgressDetail: Deliver 5 Gold Ingots to Rio.
CompleteDetail: You learned the Gem Appraisal skill from Rio.

BeforeDetail: If you\'re interested in driving, talk to Joey.
ProgressDetail: Joey said he\'ll teach you mechanical maintenance once you\'ve equipped your first vehicle.
CompleteDetail: You  learned the Mechanic Mastery skill.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Michael for Driving.
ProgressDetail: Reach Mechanic Mastery Level 3
CompleteDetail: You learned the Burst Acceleration skill from Michael.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Nurse Syra about potion research.
ProgressDetail: Syra asks you to collect 5 Red Herbs and 5 Red Mushrooms for her experiment.
CompleteDetail: You delivered the ingredients to Syra and received a Test Potion.

BeforeDetail: Syra says she has something to discuss about the test potion.
ProgressDetail: Syra asks you to drink the Test Potion to help record its effects. Talk to her again after drinking it.
CompleteDetail: After drinking the potion, intense heat surges through your body. Syra panics and tells you to find Doctor Jun, who has seen this kind of reaction before.

BeforeDetail: Ask Jun for help.
ProgressDetail: Jun says the red heat is too intense and asks you to bring 5 Blue Herbs to neutralize it.
CompleteDetail: You overcame the potion’s side effects and learned the Range Impact skill.

BeforeDetail: Halen says the village currently needs support for development and is accepting donations on behalf of the village.
ProgressDetail: Halen says the village currently needs support for development and is accepting donations on behalf of the village.
CompleteDetail: You donated 50,000 gold to the village through Halen.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Reina.
ProgressDetail: Reina says if you\'re interested in changing your appearance, bring 10 Gold Coins and speak to her.
CompleteDetail: Reina says you can talk to her with the keyword Makeup to change your appearance, and that she will charge gold each time you make a change.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Jocelyn.
ProgressDetail: Jocelyn says she\'s been terribly unlucky lately.
CompleteDetail: Jocelyn says she\'s been terribly unlucky lately.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Cassandra.
ProgressDetail: Cassandra says she\'d love to help, but she’s also been feeling unlucky.
CompleteDetail: Cassandra says she\'d love to help, but she’s also been feeling unlucky.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Nick.
ProgressDetail: Win 3 consecutive games of Rock-Paper-Scissors against him.
CompleteDetail: Cassandra says she\'d love to help, but she’s also been feeling unlucky.

BeforeDetail: Talk to Cassandra
ProgressDetail: Talk to Cassandra when your Lucky Dice shows a 6.
CompleteDetail: Cassandra says you look exceptionally lucky today.

BeforeDetail: Deliver the lucky charm to Jocelyn.
ProgressDetail: Deliver the lucky charm to Jocelyn.
CompleteDetail: Jocelyn gratefully accepts the charm, saying she won\'t poke holes in pants anymore while sewing.

BeforeDetail: Sean says you must learn to read the stories in the stars.
ProgressDetail: Sean says you must learn to read the stories in the stars.
CompleteDetail: Complete: You deliver the materials. Sean teaches you Astrology.

BeforeDetail: After learning astrology, talk to Dan.
ProgressDetail: Dan reflects that stories might be fiction or maybe not. In the end, what you believe becomes your truth.
CompleteDetail: After meeting the requirement, Dan teaches you Lightning Ball.
FindKeywardTarget: Reach Level 3 in Fireball and Iceball.

BeforeDetail: Talk with Dan
ProgressDetail: Dan questions whether you can truly master all elements.
CompleteDetail: Upon proving your control over all elements, Dan acknowledges your growth and teaches you Magic Mastery.

BeforeDetail: Talk with Sean
ProgressDetail: Sean remarks that the end of a story is always the beginning of a new one.
CompleteDetail: Sean remarks that the end of a story is always the beginning of a new one.

TargetName: (("Reach level 10 of Writing.", 1),("Reach level 10 of Painting", 1),("Reach level 10 of Composition", 1))

BeforeDetail: The population of certain animals has grown too large, disturbing the balance of the ecosystem.
ProgressDetail: The population of certain animals has grown too large, disturbing the balance of the ecosystem.
CompleteDetail: The population of certain animals has grown too large, disturbing the balance of the ecosystem.

BeforeDetail: The village is undergoing restoration work, and we’re in need of building materials.
ProgressDetail: The village is undergoing restoration work, and we’re in need of building materials.
CompleteDetail: The village is undergoing restoration work, and we’re in need of building materials.

BeforeDetail: Rumors have been spreading lately...
ProgressDetail: Rumors have been spreading lately...
CompleteDetail: Rumors have been spreading lately...

QuestName: What Lies at the End of the Labyrinth?
BeforeDetail: Deep within the mines,unusual and mysterious places are sometimes discovered.
ProgressDetail: Deep within the mines,unusual and mysterious places are sometimes discovered.
CompleteDetail: Deep within the mines,unusual and mysterious places are sometimes discovered.

BeforeDetail: The village is undergoing reconstruction,and we are accepting gold coin donations to support the effort.
ProgressDetail: The village is undergoing reconstruction,and we are accepting gold coin donations to support the effort.
CompleteDetail: The village is undergoing reconstruction,and we are accepting gold coin donations to support the effort.

BeforeDetail: Erica says that if you\'re interested in fishing, you should come find her.
ProgressDetail: To learn the fishing skill from Erika, catch 5 StoneSeaBass.
CompleteDetail: You caught 5 Stone Seabass, a fish commonly found in these waters.

BeforeDetail: Erica says to drop by again if you\'re still interested in fishing.
ProgressDetail: To master the fishing skill, collect one fish from each season.
CompleteDetail: You’ve caught all the seasonal fish. That should prove you’re a real angler now, right?

BeforeDetail: Erika wants to show you a way to preserve salmon for longer. She asks you to bring her a Dried Waterlily Salmon.
ProgressDetail: Obtain a Dried Water Lily Salmon and deliver it to Erika.
CompleteDetail: ou brought the preserved salmon! Erika smiles, knowing you’ve learned a useful preservation method.

BeforeDetail: Prepare three fish for the legendary cat said to appear in the village.
ProgressDetail: Keep the fish ready and wait for the cat to show itself.
CompleteDetail: The cat ate the fish and vanished. Perhaps it will return again someday.

BeforeDetail: Alex is looking for someone to test his heartbeat device.
ProgressDetail: Hunt 10 Rabbits to test the device.
CompleteDetail: You hunted the rabbits in time and helped Alex test the machine.

BeforeDetail: Alex needs help preparing materials for his report.
ProgressDetail: Collect 5 Sheets of Paper and 1 Ink Pen and deliver them to Alex.
CompleteDetail: You delivered the materials. Alex can now finish his report.

BeforeDetail: Alex asks for further help to fine-tune the data.
ProgressDetail: Hunt 5 Foxes to provide accurate readings.
CompleteDetail: You successfully assisted Alex with fine-tuning the device.

BeforeDetail: Alex gives you adjusted numbers and asks you to see Joey.
ProgressDetail: Joey requests 1 Iron and 1 Nail to continue the adjustment.
CompleteDetail: You delivered the materials. The engineering process continues.

BeforeDetail: Aiden looks exhausted and asks for something sweet.
ProgressDetail: Bring 1 Honey Water to Aiden.
CompleteDetail: You gave Aiden the honey water. He feels a little better.

BeforeDetail: Aiden misses the taste of home cooking.
ProgressDetail: Cook and deliver 1 Fried Egg to Aiden.
CompleteDetail: You delivered the fried egg. Aiden enjoyed the simple taste of home.

BeforeDetail: Aiden wants to make his own fatigue recovery tonic.
ProgressDetail: Bring 1 Potato Vodka and 1 Chili Pepper to Aiden.
CompleteDetail: You delivered the ingredients. Aiden made his tonic and feels refreshed.

BeforeDetail: Joey misses his homeland and wants to taste familiar food again.
ProgressDetail: Deliver 1 Lettuce, 1 Chili Pepper, 1 Garlic, and 1 Salt to Joey.
CompleteDetail: You helped Joey make kimchi. He thanks you and shares the recipe.

BeforeDetail: Leon wants to welcome you to the village with a barbecue party.
ProgressDetail: Talk to Blake the firefighter and share Leon’s plan.
CompleteDetail: Blake is excited about the party and agrees to help.

BeforeDetail: Blake wants to prepare the fire for the barbecue.
ProgressDetail: Bring 5 Firewood Logs to Blake.
CompleteDetail: Blake lit the fire. He tells you to visit Sebastian for the meat.

BeforeDetail: Sebastian will prepare the meat for the party.
ProgressDetail: Collect and deliver 10 Raw Meat to Sebastian.
CompleteDetail: Sebastian prepares the meat and sends you to Darius for vegetables.

BeforeDetail: Darius will provide vegetables for the barbecue.
ProgressDetail: Gather 10 Green Herbs ,White Mushrooms and  5 potatos, corn.
CompleteDetail: Darius prepared the veggies. He recommends seeing Nora for the sauce.

BeforeDetail: Nora will make a special barbecue sauce.
ProgressDetail: Deliver 1 Garlic, 1 Chili, 1 Salt, 1 Pepper, 1 Sugar.
CompleteDetail: Nora finishes the sauce. She tells you music is still missing.

BeforeDetail: Bella insists the party needs music.
ProgressDetail: Ask Celine, the lifeguard, if the beach can be used as the venue.
CompleteDetail: Celine agrees but warns of dangerous crabs at the beach.

BeforeDetail: The beach is full of aggressive crabs.
ProgressDetail: Defeat 5 Crabs at the beach.
CompleteDetail: The area is safe. Return to Leon with the good news.

BeforeDetail: Everything is ready for the barbecue party.
ProgressDetail: Talk to Leon and start the party.
CompleteDetail: The barbecue party was a success! Everyone enjoyed the feast.

BeforeDetail: Celine found a mysterious bottle washed up on the shore.
ProgressDetail: Deliver the sealed bottle with a strange library mark to Sean.
CompleteDetail: Sean recognizes the mark and examines the bottle carefully.

BeforeDetail: Sean suggests trying to infuse mana into the bottle’s seal.
ProgressDetail: Use the bottle and attempt to open it.
CompleteDetail: The seal reacts and the bottle opens slightly.

BeforeDetail: Inside the bottle is a piece of an unknown story.
ProgressDetail: Show the page to Celine, who first found the bottle.
CompleteDetail: Celine seems puzzled and recalls an old memory.

BeforeDetail: Celine remembers a childhood cipher she created with Daniel.
ProgressDetail: Ask Daniel about the strange coded letter.
CompleteDetail: Daniel faintly recalls hiding the rules long ago.

BeforeDetail: Daniel says he once buried the cipher rules near the museum.
ProgressDetail: Search the ground near the museum for the buried note.
