CompleteDetail: You discovered the old cipher note.
FindKeywardTarget: Search the ground near the museum

BeforeDetail: You now hold the cipher rules.
ProgressDetail: Deliver the note to Celine.
CompleteDetail: Celine uses the note to begin decoding the letter.

BeforeDetail: Celine deciphers the message, but something feels wrong.
ProgressDetail: Listen to what Celine has uncovered from the letter.
CompleteDetail: The story does not match her memories.

BeforeDetail: The letter claims Celine’s parents died in a storm, not a car accident.
ProgressDetail: Ask Daniel about the truth.
CompleteDetail: Daniel directs you to someone else who may know the real story.

BeforeDetail: Daniel suspects the story resembles a village folktale.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Erik about the Borrowed book.
CompleteDetail: Iris recalls a related book that was recently borrowed.

BeforeDetail: Iris says Erik borrowed the book about a shipwreck at sea.
ProgressDetail: Help Erik by catching 5 Sea Bass so he can search for the book.
CompleteDetail: Erik finds the storybook and gives it to you.

BeforeDetail: Deliver the recovered storybook to Celine.
ProgressDetail: Hand the book over and let Celine read the ending.
CompleteDetail: The truth is revealed as a child, Celine rewrote the ending into a happy one.

BeforeDetail: Darius has started expanding the warehouse but needs extra materials.
ProgressDetail: Deliver 5 Logs of Wood to Darius.
CompleteDetail: The warehouse expansion begins with your help.

BeforeDetail: Darius wants sturdy cabinets for the new warehouse.
ProgressDetail: Talk to Fergus, the blacksmith, about building storage cabinets.
CompleteDetail: Fergus agrees to make the cabinets if given the right materials.

BeforeDetail: Fergus needs more wood to finish the storage cabinets.
ProgressDetail: Deliver 15 Logs of Wood to Fergus.
CompleteDetail: Fergus builds the storage cabinets.

BeforeDetail: The new cabinets are ready. Now the warehouse must be filled.
ProgressDetail: Collect and deliver 10 Potatoes, 10 Corn, and 10 Eggplants.
CompleteDetail: The warehouse is stocked with fresh crops.

BeforeDetail: Rats have invaded the newly stocked warehouse.
ProgressDetail: Hunt down 15 Rats in the cave to eliminate their nest.
CompleteDetail: The rat problem is resolved, and the food is safe again.

BeforeDetail: With the rats gone, more supplies are needed.
ProgressDetail: Collect and deliver 10 Tomatoes, 10 Pumpkin, and 10 Wheat.
CompleteDetail: Darius restocks the warehouse and rewards you with fresh food.

BeforeDetail: Food spoils quickly without cooling. Darius suggests meeting Joey.
ProgressDetail: Talk to Joey about building a cooling system.
CompleteDetail: Joey explains he can create one with the right resources.

BeforeDetail: Joey needs metal resources to craft the cooling system.
ProgressDetail: Deliver 10 Copper, 10 Iron, and 10 Gold to Joey.
CompleteDetail: Joey begins constructing the cooling system for the warehouse.

BeforeDetail: Darius asks for your help with ongoing warehouse restocking.
ProgressDetail: Deliver 10 Random Crops
CompleteDetail: The warehouse is restocked and ready for future use.

BeforeDetail: Herbalist Ivy remembers reading about a “Four-Leaf Clover of Luck.”
ProgressDetail: Collect 30 Green Herbs to begin the search.
CompleteDetail: You’ve gathered enough herbs. Ivy sends you to the library.

BeforeDetail: Ivy asks you to confirm the story in the library.
ProgressDetail: Talk to Iris, the librarian.
CompleteDetail: Iris points you to Emily, who borrowed the book.

BeforeDetail: Emily borrowed the book to find a way to beat Nick at rock-paper-scissors.
ProgressDetail: Retrieve the borrowed book from Emily.
CompleteDetail: You return the book and learn more about clovers.

BeforeDetail: Nick, the village’s luck icon, challenges you.
ProgressDetail: Win against Nick in Rock-Paper-Scissors at least twice.
CompleteDetail: You beat Nick and earn his respect.

BeforeDetail: Nick suggests gathering herbs once more for clarity.
ProgressDetail: Collect 30 Green Herbs and talk to Ivy.
CompleteDetail: Ivy thanks you and continues the search.

BeforeDetail: Ivy accepts that maybe the real treasure is the journey itself.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Ivy about what you’ve learned.
CompleteDetail: The quest ends with newfound wisdom, though no clover.

BeforeDetail: As you turn to leave, the wind rustles the grass.
ProgressDetail: Investigate the glowing leaves hidden among the blades.
CompleteDetail: You discover the true Four-Leaf Clover, shining faintly in the field.
FindKeywardTarget: Search the ground near the Ivy's Tent

BeforeDetail: Doctor Jun reports that a strange headache has spread through the village.
ProgressDetail: Talk to Syra and receive the list of patients.
CompleteDetail: You received the list of patients from Syra.

BeforeDetail: Syra asks you to deliver the patient list to Jun.
ProgressDetail: Bring the list to Jun.
CompleteDetail: Jun reviews the list and suspects the phenomenon might be linked to the Zodiac.

BeforeDetail: Jun believes this mysterious illness may be astronomical in nature and tells you to see Sean.
ProgressDetail: Talk to Sean and ask about the cause.
CompleteDetail: Sean explains that the balance of Libra has collapsed and that you must travel to Olympus.

BeforeDetail: Zeus claims to know how to restore the balance of the stars.
ProgressDetail: Listen to Zeus
CompleteDetail: Hera says that your constellation skill must grow stronger to restore equilibrium.

BeforeDetail: Hera requests pure materials to create the Stellar Essence.
ProgressDetail: Collect 1 glass of milk and 1 diamond, then bring them to Hera.
CompleteDetail: Hera fuses the two materials into a Stellar Essence, teaching you a new skill.

BeforeDetail: Hera tells you to strengthen your mastery over the stars.
ProgressDetail: Raise your Astronomy skill to Level 5.
CompleteDetail: Your constellation power strengthens, and new starlight awakens within you.

BeforeDetail: Hera asks you to share the Stellar Essence with the world. Start by bringing it to Syra.
ProgressDetail: Deliver 6 Stellar Essences to Syra.
CompleteDetail: Syra is amazed — she discovers the essence stabilizes life energy itself.

BeforeDetail: Syra asks you to deliver her research results to Sean.
ProgressDetail: Bring the Stellar Essence report to Sean.
CompleteDetail: Sean is astonished — he realizes Libra’s balance lies in harmony between the stars and humankind.

BeforeDetail: Chef Nora is busy preparing for a city-wide cooking contest and seems to need your help.
ProgressDetail: Talk to Nora and offer your help with the contest preparations.
CompleteDetail: Nora decides to join the contest and asks you to help her create the perfect dishes.

BeforeDetail: Nora wants to serve a seafood appetizer at the contest.
ProgressDetail: Catch 1 Salmon and bring it back to Nora.
CompleteDetail: Nora is pleased with the oysters and plans the main dish.

BeforeDetail: Nora decides the main dish should feature meat.
ProgressDetail: Gather 5 Meat, 1 Salt, and Pepper for Nora.
CompleteDetail: Nora prepares the meat dish and thinks of dessert next.

BeforeDetail: Nora wants to impress the judges with a sweet dessert.
ProgressDetail: Collect Whipped Cream, Strawberries, and Milk.
CompleteDetail: Nora prepares a beautiful dessert.

BeforeDetail: Nora says even with all the effort, luck still matters.
ProgressDetail: Visit Cassandra and ask her to craft a Lucky Charm for Nora.
CompleteDetail: You deliver the charm, and Nora feels confident.

BeforeDetail: Everything for the contest is ready.
ProgressDetail: Talk to Nora and wish her luck in the competition.
CompleteDetail: Nora wins the cooking contest thanks to your support!

BeforeDetail: Leon is working on a new development project for the village.
ProgressDetail: Speak with Fiona about drawing up the building plans.
CompleteDetail: Fiona agrees to prepare the designs.

BeforeDetail: Fiona needs materials to complete the construction plans.
ProgressDetail: Collect 10 Iron Ingot, 10 Baked Stone, and 10 Nails and bring them to Fergus.
CompleteDetail: Fergus forges the parts and delivers them to Fiona.

BeforeDetail: Construction will require the help of Leymore.
ProgressDetail: Deliver Fiona’s request letter to Leymore and collect 10 Stone, 10 Copper, 10 Steel, and 10 Gold for Fergus.
CompleteDetail: Leymore and Fergus coordinate their efforts for the project.

BeforeDetail: Construction progress is being disrupted by pests.
ProgressDetail: Hunt down 30 Rats in the mine to secure the site.
CompleteDetail: The pests are cleared, and work can continue smoothly.

BeforeDetail: The construction is nearly complete.
ProgressDetail: Report back to Leon about the progress.
CompleteDetail: Leon thanks you for your help. The tunnel project is a success!

BeforeDetail: Leymore has heard strange rumors about ghosts in the mine.
ProgressDetail: Reach floor 30 of the mine to investigate.
CompleteDetail: You descended to floor 30. The rumors seem to have some truth.

BeforeDetail: Leymore asks you to investigate further.
ProgressDetail: Reach floor 50 of the mine and see what’s hidden below.
CompleteDetail: On the 50th floor, you encounter the ghost of an old man.

BeforeDetail: You met a ghost resembling an old man deep in the mine.
ProgressDetail: Report the encounter to Sean.
CompleteDetail: Sean believes the ghost is part of a story once sealed by your grandfather.

BeforeDetail: Sean finds a damaged story page connected to the ghost.
ProgressDetail: Deliver Ink and Blank Pages, and raise Writing Skill to Lv.3 to restore it.
CompleteDetail: The restored page is ready to be used.

BeforeDetail: The ghost awaits the restored page in the depths of the mine.
ProgressDetail: Return to the 50th floor and use the page on the old man’s ghost.
CompleteDetail: The ghost accepts the restored story and fades peacefully away.
